description_long: This object is a rocket-propelled grenade launcher, specifically resembling the RPG-7, a shoulder-fired anti-tank weapon. The launcher features a long cylindrical barrel with a flared muzzle at the rear and a conical warhead at the front. The body is primarily black metal, with a wooden or wood-textured handguard and stock section, providing both grip and support. Two prominent vertical grips are visible beneath the barrel, aiding in stability and aiming. The front of the launcher is fitted with a pointed, finned projectile, while the rear has a wide, bell-shaped exhaust. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical details and a rugged, functional appearance.
description: A black and wood-textured RPG-7 style rocket launcher with a conical warhead, flared rear muzzle, and dual vertical grips.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the launcher, including the wooden handguard, flared rear, and pointed warhead.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the conical warhead and the narrow profile of the launcher.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden handguard and flared rear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the wide, bell-shaped muzzle and the slim profile of the launcher.
